content.text:
🤔Doing re-evidence for myself how the IPFS network performs on bigger datasets. 

📥 IPFS desktop from https://github.com/ipfs-shipyard/ipfs-desktop

📌 Project Apollo Archives (57G) 

👀It goes smoothly, peer count is around 200.

👌UX improved quite a lot over years

👏 Great work @hacdias🤗

#ipfs
